name: community plugin rule id collision with a built-in rule id is rejected at install time
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example && printf 'name: example
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    detector: x
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'collision_with_builtin' err.txt && grep -q 'g-ts-001' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
